title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Yeah, they just won't campaign aggressively. Though it does speak of the predicament that Starmer has left Labour in that even in a "terrible" seat they have cleared 10% in almost every ward there in the locals.
items.content_text: Yeah, they just won't campaign aggressively. Though it does speak of the predicament that Starmer has left Labour in that even in a "terrible" seat they have cleared 10% in almost every ward there in the locals.
